# Gilberto Moraes — Senior Full-Stack Engineer

> This page is the interactive resume of Gilberto Moraes, a Senior Full-Stack Engineer based in São Paulo, Brazil.

## Key Facts

- 10+ years shipping production software
- 1.6k+ verified commits (Softo + Buildaz repos)
- 403 PRs/MRs authored (GitHub + GitLab)
- 100M+ app installs on projects I owned solo

## Skills Summary

TypeScript, React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Vue.js, NestJS, FastAPI, PHP/Laravel,
PostgreSQL, pgvector, GraphQL, Docker, CI/CD, AWS, Azure, Firebase, AI agent orchestration,
RAG pipelines, MCP, PydanticAI, LLM tooling, Jest, Vitest, Cypress, Storybook, TDD.

## Current Position

Buildaz (Dec 2023 – present) — Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Freelance)
Clients: Kivvon, Sarstedt AG (8 countries), Krüger Lidwig
519 commits · 207 PRs on GitHub
